title: Innovative Light Norwegian Walnut Pilaf
description: A kid-friendly Norwegian dish featuring walnuts and candy, this pilaf is peppery, light, and vegan-friendly, made in a kazan-cauldron.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a kazan-cauldron over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the chopped walnuts and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the brown rice, candy pieces, black pepper, and salt, stirring to combine.
Cook for 5 minutes, stirring frequently, until the rice is lightly toasted.
Add 4 cups of water to the kazan-cauldron and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the liquid is absorbed.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
